product.description: Defines the name of the product

jobID.description: Unique id to get the xml files for the requested date

status.description: Returns any of the 2 results Submitted ->Running->Completed and Failed

percentDone.description: Returns how much percentage of  task is completed for the requested jobID

startDate.description: The date from which the data is required in YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ format

endDate.description: The date until which the data is fetched in YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ format

part.description: Returns the part number of the jobID
